messages.content: I'm training indoors. Can you show me how to teach stay? I want simple steps.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Increase time and distance gradually", "Hold your palm out and say stay", "Ask your dog to sit first", "Take one small step back"], "common_mistake": "Expecting long stays too soon", "session_length_minutes": 7, "reward_tip": "Reward often in the early stages"}
I'm training indoors. How should I teach down to my dog? Keep it easy to follow.

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Guide the dog forward and down with the lure", "Mark the full down position", "Reward as soon as the dog lies down", "Lower the treat slowly to the floor"], "common_mistake": "Moving the treat too quickly", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Use a smooth hand motion toward the floor"}
Please help. What's a simple way to teach eye contact? Please keep it beginner friendly.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Reward immediately for attention", "Say the cue watch me", "Wait quietly for eye contact", "Hold a treat near your eyes"], "common_mistake": "Waiting too long to reward eye contact", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Start in a quiet room"}
Please help. My dog looks everywhere except at me Short sessions work best for us.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Mark the moment your dog looks at you", "Build duration slowly over time", "Reward immediately for attention", "Say the cue watch me"], "common_mistake": "Asking for too much duration at the start", "session_length_minutes": 3, "reward_tip": "Practice in very short bursts"}
I need a beginner plan for sit Please keep it beginner friendly.

{"command": "sit", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Reward immediately when seated", "Move the treat upward so the head follows", "Mark the sit with praise or a click", "Wait for the dog's bottom to lower"], "common_mistake": "Pushing the dog into position", "session_length_minutes": 3, "reward_tip": "Use soft treats for quick rewards"}
Please help. Can you help me train sit at home?

{"command": "sit", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Hold a treat close to your dog's nose", "Repeat in short sessions", "Move the treat upward so the head follows", "Reward immediately when seated"], "common_mistake": "Pushing the dog into position", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Keep sessions short and upbeat"}
I want a short session plan. Can you show me how to teach stay? Short sessions work best for us.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Ask your dog to sit first", "Increase time and distance gradually", "Pause for one second before moving", "Return to your dog before rewarding"], "common_mistake": "Expecting long stays too soon", "session_length_minutes": 8, "reward_tip": "Reward often in the early stages"}
My dog is a beginner. My dog pops back up when I ask for down Short sessions work best for us.

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Start with the treat near your dog's nose", "Wait for elbows to reach the ground", "Mark the full down position", "Reward as soon as the dog lies down"], "common_mistake": "Rewarding a partial crouch", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Train on a comfortable surface"}
Please help. Help me train my dog to hold position

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Return to your dog before rewarding", "Take one small step back", "Hold your palm out and say stay", "Ask your dog to sit first"], "common_mistake": "Expecting long stays too soon", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Use calm praise and steady body language"}
My dog is a beginner. What's the best beginner approach for stay? Short sessions work best for us.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Hold your palm out and say stay", "Ask your dog to sit first", "Return to your dog before rewarding", "Pause for one second before moving"], "common_mistake": "Adding distractions too early", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Keep the first repetitions very short"}
Please help. Can you help me train watch me? I want simple steps.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Wait quietly for eye contact", "Reward immediately for attention", "Build duration slowly over time", "Hold a treat near your eyes"], "common_mistake": "Training in a distracting place too early", "session_length_minutes": 3, "reward_tip": "Use high-value treats to build focus"}
My dog is a beginner. How should I teach down to my dog? Keep it easy to follow.

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Lower the treat slowly to the floor", "Guide the dog forward and down with the lure", "Start with the treat near your dog's nose", "Reward as soon as the dog lies down"], "common_mistake": "Practicing on a slippery surface", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Use a smooth hand motion toward the floor"}
Can you help me train sit at home? Keep it easy to follow.

{"command": "sit", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Move the treat upward so the head follows", "Hold a treat close to your dog's nose", "Mark the sit with praise or a click", "Repeat in short sessions"], "common_mistake": "Rewarding too late", "session_length_minutes": 3, "reward_tip": "Use small, high-value treats"}
Can you show me how to teach stay? Please keep it beginner friendly.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Ask your dog to sit first", "Take one small step back", "Increase time and distance gradually", "Pause for one second before moving"], "common_mistake": "Expecting long stays too soon", "session_length_minutes": 8, "reward_tip": "Reward often in the early stages"}
Show me a simple down training plan Please keep it beginner friendly.

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Wait for elbows to reach the ground", "Reward as soon as the dog lies down", "Lower the treat slowly to the floor", "Mark the full down position"], "common_mistake": "Using long sessions that frustrate the dog", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Use soft treats the dog can eat quickly"}
Show me a simple down training plan

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Reward as soon as the dog lies down", "Lower the treat slowly to the floor", "Wait for elbows to reach the ground", "Start with the treat near your dog's nose"], "common_mistake": "Moving the treat too quickly", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Use soft treats the dog can eat quickly"}
I'm training indoors. What's a simple way to teach eye contact? Please keep it beginner friendly.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Build duration slowly over time", "Wait quietly for eye contact", "Reward immediately for attention", "Hold a treat near your eyes"], "common_mistake": "Asking for too much duration at the start", "session_length_minutes": 3, "reward_tip": "Reward the first quick glances at you"}
My dog knows the treat but not the sit cue

{"command": "sit", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Reward immediately when seated", "Move the treat upward so the head follows", "Repeat in short sessions", "Hold a treat close to your dog's nose"], "common_mistake": "Using a treat lure that moves too fast", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Keep sessions short and upbeat"}
My dog is a beginner. What's a simple way to teach sit? Keep it easy to follow.

{"command": "sit", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Mark the sit with praise or a click", "Move the treat upward so the head follows", "Hold a treat close to your dog's nose", "Wait for the dog's bottom to lower"], "common_mistake": "Using a treat lure that moves too fast", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Pair food rewards with calm praise"}
My dog is a beginner. How do I teach my dog to check in with me? Short sessions work best for us.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Hold a treat near your eyes", "Mark the moment your dog looks at you", "Reward immediately for attention", "Wait quietly for eye contact"], "common_mistake": "Holding the treat too far from your face", "session_length_minutes": 4, "reward_tip": "Practice in very short bursts"}
